title: ornithopus minor
intro: Ornithopus minor, also known as lesser bird's foot trefoil, is a perennial herb in the legume family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ornithopus minor include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including gastrointestinal disorders and skin conditions.
